entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop studied for its response to drought stress and root exudation patterns.

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: An environmental stressor that impacts the concentration and composition of root exudates and BNI activity.

entities.name: ROOT EXUDATES
entities.description: Low molecular weight compounds secreted by roots into the soil to interact with microbes.

entities.name: SOIL MICROBES
entities.description: Microorganisms in the rhizosphere that are manipulated by root exudates to adapt to harsh conditions.

entities.name: RHIZOSPHERE
entities.description: The soil region surrounding the roots where plants and microbes interact.

entities.name: BNI ACTIVITY
entities.description: Biological nitrification inhibition activity that is influenced by root exudates and drought stress.

entities.name: ELONGATED ROOT GROWTH
entities.description: A root growth characteristic that shows a genotype-specific relation with root exudation under drought stress.

entities.name: GC-MS AND LC-MS
entities.description: A combined platform of gas and liquid chromatography coupled to mass spectrometry used for metabolic profiling.

entities.name: METABOLITES
entities.description: Primary and secondary chemical compounds analyzed within root exudates.
